git_op.description: Executes location-agnostic git operations. Supports automated sync (stage-commit-pull-push) or inspection.

parameters.repo: The full path to the git repository on the S: drive.
parameters.action: The command to run: [status | log | sync]
parameters.message: Required if action is 'sync'. The commit message for the cycle.

atomicity_rule: Dynamic git operations must result in a consistent repository state. The 'sync' action is atomic: failure at any stage (commit, pull, push) must result in a full stop and HIL escalation to prevent head-detachment or merge conflicts.
